title: Girls Like Me Don't Go Out With Losers Like You

sentences.en: So I called your room last night. I heard.
I was thinking maybe we could go out sometime. No, you're a dork.
sentences.ko: 우리 언제 한번 만날까 해서. 싫어, 넌 찐따야.

sentences.en: Look, I'm not gonna go out with you. I can't believe you'd even ask.
sentences.ko: 있잖아, 나 너랑 안 만나. 그런 걸 물어보다니 믿기지가 않아.

sentences.en: Girls like me don't go out with losers like you.
sentences.ko: 나 같은 여자는 너 같은 루저랑 안 만나.

sentences.en: Let's get out of here. Excuse me.
Why didn't you call me? What? We spent a beautiful night together and then I never hear from you again?
sentences.ko: 왜 전화 안 했어? 뭐? 우리 그렇게 아름다운 밤을 보냈는데 그 뒤로 연락이 없어?

sentences.en: I'm sorry? Sorry for what? For breaking my heart or for giving me the greatest pleasure I've ever known
sentences.ko: 미안하다고? 뭐가 미안한 건데? 내 마음을 아프게 한 거? 아니면 내 인생 최고의 행복을 주고

sentences.en: and then just taking it away?
Well, forget it. I've already spent too many hours crying over you.
sentences.ko: 됐어, 잊어. 너 때문에 울면서 보낸 시간이 너무 많아.

sentences.en: So, when did you want to go out? Huh.
